sentiment.summary: S&P 500 fully erased Iran war losses as ceasefire talks advanced, oil retreated from $114 highs, and VIX cooled to 18 — broad risk-on rally with tech leading.

insights.text: S&P 500 wipes out all Iran war losses — ceasefire optimism takes hold. Markets staged a powerful recovery: S&P +1%, Nasdaq +1.2%, Dow +0.6%. US-Iran ceasefire talks gaining traction while oil retreated from $114 peaks to $97. VIX cooled to 18.57. Broad earnings growth of 14% YoY across 10 of 11 sectors gives this rally fundamental legs.

BTC breaks above your $73,135 cost basis — surging toward $76K. Bitcoin hit $74,361, its highest level since the Feb 5 crash. Risk appetite is returning hard. Next resistance at $76K; a break there targets $80K+. You are finally in the green on this position — momentum is strong, hold.

Rocket Lab +4.5% on Gauss thruster unveil and iQPS multi-launch agreement. New Hall Thruster with 200+ units/yr production capacity announced. Cantor Fitzgerald reiterated Overweight at $85 target tied to 15 total iQPS missions. Now ~$71, about 15% above your $62.04 cost. Space infrastructure thesis fully intact.

EchoStar dips 2.4% to $125.55 — still 10% above your $114.33 cost basis. The $17B SpaceX AWS-4 spectrum sale remains the dominant narrative and a massive balance sheet catalyst. 30-day return remains near 19%. Slight pullback today is noise — hold and watch FCC spectrum vote timing as the next trigger.

T1 Energy announces $125M convertible notes — dilution hits a bleeding stock. TE slid from the mid-$7s to ~$5.19, now 23% below your ~$6.73 cost. Capital raise funds Phase 1 of the Austin 2.1GW solar fab but adds near-term dilution pressure. Strong Buy consensus with $7.30 target suggests the thesis survives — but this is a painful hold.

Seagate hits $528 — you are up 18% from your $448.98 cost basis. STX added another 3% today extending an 8-day, 39% win streak on HAMR drive demand and a Citi target raise to $595. FY2025 revenue grew 39% YoY. Stock may be extended but the AI storage supercycle is real. Set a trailing stop to protect these gains.

Telesat holds near $43 — 29% above your $33.33 cost basis. TSAT is trading near its 52-week high of $46.65. Lightspeed LEO first launches due late 2026 remain the key catalyst. Watch the $1.7B debt maturing December 2026 — dilutive financing is a real risk. Broader satellite sector benefits from geopolitical demand for resilient comms.

BigBear.ai at $3.54 — down 61% from your $9.02 cost and still falling. BBAI continues to lag even as AI stocks rally. Q4 revenue missed badly. Special stockholder meeting April 21 and a platform-centric AI pivot are the only near-term catalysts. Competition is intense and execution has been weak. This position needs a hard reassessment.

Nebius at $156.85 — 20% above your $131.12 cost and near all-time highs. Goldman Sachs raised its target to $205 after the $27B Meta AI contract. AI21 Labs acquisition sparked a 33% surge. All 22 technical indicators are bullish. This is your strongest position right now — let it run. Minor insider selling (6,250 shares) is noise.

Oklo rips 9.7% on AI nuclear deals — still deep underwater from $125 cost. 12 GW data-center deal with Switch and LOI with Equinix are driving momentum. Wedbush kept Outperform but cut target to $110. At ~$53, you are down ~58% from cost. Nuclear power for AI is a decade-long thesis — hold if you believe, but eyes open on execution risk.

Navitas pulls back to $9.32 — just below your $10.00 cost basis. NVTS gave back some of its April 8 spike driven by the AI server power board at NVIDIA GTC. Earnings due May 4 are the next major catalyst. GaN power semiconductors for AI data centers is a solid structural theme — hold through earnings before adding or trimming.
